| `f0`–`f7` | `ft0`–`ft7` | **Temporals** | *Caller* |
| `f8`–`f9` | `fs0`–`fs1` | **Segurs** | *Callee* |
| `f10`–`f11` | `fa0`–`fa1` | **Arguments** de subrutines / Valors de **retorns** | *Caller* |
| `f12`–`f17` | `fa2`–`fa7` | **Arguments** de subrutines | *Caller* |
| `f18`–`f27` | `fs2`–`fs11` | **Segurs** | *Callee* |
| `f28`–`f31` | `ft8`–`ft11` | **Temporals** | *Caller* |
